description: Product Description Experience innovative all day comfort with our collection of plain and patterned men's and ladies' socks from Gentle Grip. Featuring a special comfort cuff that moulds to the natural contours of your leg, Gentle Grip socks offer a looser, less constrictive fit while still keeping your socks up. Try them for yourself and feel the incredible comfort, whether you wear them to the office or in your leisure time. Honeycomb Top Designed to be constriction-free, SOCKSHOP Gentle Grip Socks’ HoneyComb Top holds without elastication, comfortably moulding to your legs’ natural contours without causing the uncomfortable rings that normal tight sock tops can result in. NEW! Gentle Grip Bamboo Our Gentle Grip bamboo socks are rich in soft, natural bamboo fibre, which is antibacterial, non-irritating and able to thermal-regulate, so feet constantly stay at an ideal, balanced temperature. They even have strengthened toes and heels, so they resist wear well too! Gentle Grip Cotton Blend Available in varied patterns and contrasting colours, our Gentle Grip socks are manufactured with soft, breathable cotton rich yarn, and are ideal for all-purpose, everyday wear. NEW! Gentle Grip Fun Feet Comfortable doesn't have to mean boring! Our new Fun Feet range features cute and quirky designs, whilst still ensuring maximum comfort without restriction. IOMI Footnurse Gentle Grip Socks Ideal for anyone with large or otherwise swollen legs, and specifically designed for wearers at risk from medical foot and leg conditions, our Iomi Footnurse Gentle Grip socks are non-binding leg wear with HoneyComb Tops, woven to hold comfortably to the natural contours of your legs without creating pressure spots or constricting the legs, causing impeded blood circulation that can make symptoms worse. Strategic Partner of Royal College of Podiatry SOCKSHOP Gentle Grip are proud to be a strategic partner of The Royal College of Podiatry – our values and principles align with their goals to focus on improving wellbeing by pioneering foot health. SOCKSHOP Gentle Grip Men's Fun Feet Socks Pack of 3 SOCKSHOP Gentle Grip Men's Plain Cotton Socks Pack of 3 SOCKSHOP Gentle Grip Ladies Fun Feet Socks Pack of 3 SOCKSHO Iomi Footnurse Ladies Gentle Grip Socks Pack of 3 SOCKSHOP Gentle Grip Mens Colourburst Socks Pack of 3 Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 388 4.2 out of 5 stars 60 4.5 out of 5 stars 951 4.3 out of 5 stars 126 4.4 out of 5 stars 152 HoneyComb Tops ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Available in Men's Men's Ladies' Ladies' Men's
